title: agropyron caninum var. latiglume
intro: Agropyron caninum var. latiglume, also known as the blue wildrye, is a variety of grass that belongs to the wheat grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Agropyron caninum var. latiglume can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or extract, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
